accurate.why: Accurately describes the resolution as nullifying the FWS rule, with accurate description of what the rule does.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the description of the rule adding DPS listings is accurate.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution nullifies the FWS lesser prairie-chicken listing rule.

changes_to_existing_law.why: CRA disapproval does not amend existing statutes.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service.

correct_figures.why: Correctly cites November 25, 2022 as the publication date.
